name: Private Seeds, Public LLMs: Realistic and Privacy-Preserving Synthetic Data Generation

description: arXiv:2604.07486v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have emerged as a powerful tool for synthetic data generation. A particularly important use case is producing synthetic replicas of private text, which requires carefully balancing privacy and utility. We propose Realistic and Privacy-Preserving Synthetic Data Generation (RPSG), which uses private seeds and i...
author: Qian Ma, Sarah Rajtmajer
